Customers.title: Already bought Saaslyde?
Customers.subtitle: Everything that happens after purchase — no customer portal, no login. Lean by design.
Customers.step1Body: After purchase, reply to our welcome email with your GitHub username. We invite you to the private Saaslyde repo within 24 h. The GitHub invitation arrives directly from github.com — accept, clone, you're in.
Customers.step2Body: Read the README in the repo. You'll need accounts at Supabase (free), Stripe (free), Resend (free), Vercel (free) — then fill in .env.local, apply migrations, deploy.
Customers.step3Body: Starter: 1 year. Pro: lifetime. You just run git pull origin main in your cloned repo whenever you want updates. We announce releases in the Pro Discord + by email.
Customers.step4Body: Replies on business days within 24 h (Pro = priority). Bug reports as GitHub Issues in the Saaslyde repo, general questions by email.
Customers.discordBody: Pro buyers get a Discord invite link in the welcome email. Channels: Announcements, Help, Feature Requests, Showcase. Direct line to us + the Saaslyde community.
Customers.noLoginBody: Saaslyde is code-only. You get source code to clone — not a hosted tool. So there's nothing to log into on saaslyde.com itself. Your repo access IS your license.

Hero.headline: Ship your SaaS GDPR-compliant — in days, not weekends.
Hero.subhead: Next.js 16 + Supabase + Stripe boilerplate. Cookie consent, privacy policy generator, imprint, DPA PDFs — production-ready, not placeholder.
Hero.trust: One-time payment · Lemon Squeezy MoR (handles VAT) · 30-day money-back guarantee

Why.title: Three weekends you skip.
Why.subtitle: The compliance plumbing every DACH indie hacker gets wrong on first launch — production-grade in Saaslyde from day one.

Pricing.title: One payment. No subscription.
Pricing.subtitle: Lemon Squeezy as Merchant of Record — VAT for DE/EU/UK/USA handled automatically.
Pricing.comingSoon: Lemon Squeezy listing coming — sign up for the launch email:
Pricing.waitlistFallback: Email signup is being configured. In the meantime, write to us directly: support@saaslyde.com

items.a: Access to the private GitHub repo. You clone it, fill in .env values (Supabase, Stripe, Resend), deploy to Vercel. Time to first live version: ~2 hours.

items.q: Do I need a lawyer for the compliance components?
items.a: Saaslyde ships the templates a lawyer would otherwise build manually. For standard use cases (B2C SaaS, B2B tools, newsletters) you do NOT need a lawyer. For special cases (subprocessors outside the EU, health data, kids' apps) get the contract reviewed — typically a one-time €100-300 spend.

items.q: Does this only work in Germany?
items.a: No. GDPR applies EU-wide. TDDDG (cookie law) is Germany's transposition of the EU ePrivacy directive and almost identical to France's LCEN, Austria's DSG, etc. Saaslyde is DE/EN bilingual.

items.q: What if the code is outdated in 6 months?
items.a: Starter = 1 year of updates included. Pro = lifetime. Stacks used (Next.js, Supabase, Stripe, Tailwind) are LTS-relevant — the boilerplate typically stays stable 12-24 months without major refactors.

items.q: Can I resell the Saaslyde boilerplate itself?
items.a: No. You get a license to build UNLIMITED of your OWN SaaS products on top (Pro) or ONE product (Starter). Reselling or redistributing the boilerplate code itself is not allowed.
30-day money-back guarantee, no questions asked. Through Lemon Squeezy.

Footer.tagline: GDPR-compliant SaaS boilerplate for indie hackers in the EU.

Consent.title: We use cookies
Consent.description: Necessary cookies are always on. With your consent we also use analytics and marketing cookies. Details in our <privacy>privacy policy</privacy>.
Consent.customizeSubtitle: Choose which categories we may set.
Consent.necessaryDesc: Required for core functionality. Cannot be disabled.
Consent.analyticsDesc: Helps us understand and improve how the site is used.
